cases.name: simple-table
cases.desc: Group with SOH header and two records

cases.name: trailing-us-empty-field
cases.desc: N separators = N+1 fields: trailing US yields a final empty field

cases.name: leading-us-empty-field
cases.desc: Leading US yields an initial empty field

cases.name: empty-middle-field
cases.desc: Consecutive US yields an empty middle field

cases.name: empty-record-at-end
cases.desc: Trailing RS is an empty record with one empty field

cases.name: empty-record-between
cases.desc: RS RS is an empty record before the next

cases.name: escaped-us-in-value
cases.desc: DLE-escaped US is data, not a separator

cases.name: escaped-dle
cases.desc: DLE DLE decodes to a literal DLE byte

cases.name: escaped-binary-bytes
cases.desc: Escaped unassigned control bytes carry raw binary (byte-transparent values)

cases.name: nested-scope-us
cases.desc: US inside STX/ETX is not a field boundary; the scope is part of the field

cases.name: bare-records
cases.desc: Records with no FS/GS preamble (e.g. a stream log body)

cases.name: multi-group-document
cases.desc: FS file name with two GS groups

cases.name: utf8-value
cases.desc: Multibyte UTF-8 passes through untouched (no normalization)

cases.name: etb-tolerated
cases.desc: ETB commit markers are framing: parsed structure is identical with or without them

cases.name: header-no-records
cases.desc: Group with header and zero records
